chapter_title.en: The Chapter of Condolences and Grief During Calamities, Visiting Graves, Lamentation and Mourning Gatherings

text:
552 - وَ رُوِيَ أَنَّهُ قَالَ: «لاَ بَأْسَ بِكَسْبِ اَلنَّائِحَةِ إِذَا قَالَتْ صِدْقاً.
وَ فِي خَبَرٍ آخَرَ قَالَ: «تَسْتَحِلُّهُ بِضَرْبِ إِحْدَى يَدَيْهَا عَلَى اَلْأُخْرَى.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.552 - It was narrated that Imam (as) said:
"There is no issue with the earnings of the mourning woman (nā’iḥah) if She speaks truthfully."
In another narration, Imam (as) said:
"She justifies it (her earnings) by striking one of her hands on the other."
